exercises.prompt: Choose the correctly agreeing form: 'Las ventanas están ___.' (romper)
Choose the correct form to complete: 'Los documentos están ___' (firmar — used as a plain adjective describing the documents, not inside a haber construction)
exercises.note: Documentos is masculine plural, so the participle-as-adjective must agree — contrast with the frozen, invariant firmado inside a haber construction.

exercises.incorrectSentence: Los libros están abierto en la mesa.
exercises.correctSentence: Los libros están abiertos en la mesa.

exercises.prompt: Rewrite to describe the resulting state with estar + participle (agreeing with 'la tienda'):
exercises.instruction: describe the resulting state with estar + participle

exercises.prompt: Match each infinitive to its irregular past participle:
Put the words in the correct order (an absolute construction):
Fill in the blanks with the correct form of the participle in parentheses — pay attention to whether it needs to agree:
exercises.passage: La puerta estaba {0} (abrir) cuando llegamos. Las cartas, ya {1} (escribir), estaban sobre la mesa. {2} (Terminar) el trabajo, nos fuimos a casa. Nunca hemos {3} (romper) una promesa así.
